title: 3級 模擬テスト6 読解 1

passage: Recently, travel planning has become very popular in London. Since 2021, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 217 more events related to travel planning.
choices: Because it helps build a strong community.
